channel.title: AI & Tech News Aggregator
channel.description: Aggregated AI and Tech news from 11 sources

item.title: Ship fuel prices soaring in war, industry warns
item.description: [Straits Times] Prices for marine or “bunker” fuel are at their highest since the Russian invasion of Ukraine

item.title: Acquihires, often used by Big Tech, are a 'red flag,' DOJ antitrust head says
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Nothing CEO Carl Pei says smartphone apps will disappear as AI agents take their place
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Nothing CEO Carl Pei says AI agents will eventually replace apps, shifting smartphones toward systems that understand intent and act on a user's behalf.

item.title: Micron forecasts strong revenue on AI boom, shares fall on higher spending plan
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Nvidia is quietly building a multibillion-dollar behemoth to rival its chips business
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Nvidia's networking business raked in $11 billion last quarter despite getting significantly less fanfare than chips and gaming.

item.title: Blackwater founder backs Ukrainian drone tech sales to US
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: US Fed raises inflation outlook over 'uncertain' Iran war impact
item.description: [CNA Tech] "In the near term, higher energy prices will push up overall inflation," Fed Chair Jerome Powell said, referring to steeper costs from the war in the Middle East.

item.title: Back-to-back Qualtrics, EA debt sales to test debt investors' appetites in volatile market
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: David Sacks’ big Iran warning gets big time ignored
item.description: [The Verge AI] Hello and welcome to Regulator, a newsletter for Verge subscribers about the politics of technology and the technology of politics - now landing in your inbox on Wednesdays! If someone has forwarded this email to you, and you're not a Verge subscriber yet, you should sign up right here, and not just

item.title: US Fed holds rates unchanged over ‘uncertain’ Iran war implications
item.description: [Straits Times] The Fed’s 11-1 vote kept rates steady at a range between 3.5 per cent and 3.75 per cent.

item.title: ChatGPT did not cure a dog’s cancer
item.description: [The Verge AI] When an Australian tech entrepreneur with no background in biology or medicine said ChatGPT helped save his dog from cancer, the story spread with the kind of validation Big Tech has long craved: proof that AI will revolutionize medicine and take on one of its deadliest diseases. The reality, as usu

item.title: Why Walmart and OpenAI Are Shaking Up Their Agentic Shopping Deal
item.description: [WIRED AI] After OpenAI’s Instant Checkout feature fell short, Walmart is instead embedding its Sparky chatbot directly into ChatGPT and Google Gemini.

item.title: Patreon CEO calls AI companies’ fair use argument ‘bogus,’ says creators should be paid
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Patreon CEO Jack Conte says AI companies should pay creators for training data, arguing their fair use defense falls apart when they license content from major publishers.

item.title: Oil extends gains to rise 5.6% after Iran attacks Gulf energy facilities
item.description: [CNA Tech]

item.title: Rebel Audio is a new AI podcasting tool aimed at first-time creators
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Rebel Audio is a new all-in-one podcasting tool that allows creators to record podcasts, edit, clip content for social, and publish episodes, all without ever leaving the platform.

item.title: 微盟集团2025年来自AI收入破亿，SaaS商业化找到新路径｜最前线
item.description: [36氪] 文｜张子怡 编辑｜袁斯来 在Open Claw席卷世界的当下，一切价值都有可能被重估。 首当其冲的便是传统SaaS企业。 Gartner的分析师认为，到2030年，35%的单一功能SaaS工具将被AI Agent取代，或被大型SaaS供应商吸收进更广泛的智能体生态系统中。 传统SaaS企业正在被价值重估的当下，国内SaaS企业微盟集团在数年的AI转型下，完成了旗下全线SaaS产品与AI技术的原生融合，并在商业层面验证了AI驱动盈利的可持续性。 近日，微盟集团发布2025年报，总收入为人民币15.92亿元，较上年同期增长18.9%。其中，微盟首次披露AI相关年度收入达人民

item.title: The Gemini-powered features in Google Workspace that are worth using
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] From summarizing emails, drafting content, organizing data, and tracking meetings, here are all the best Gemini features in Google Workspace.

item.title: The leaderboard “you can’t game,” funded by the companies it ranks
item.description: [TechCrunch AI] Artificial intelligence models are multiplying fast, and competition is stiff. With so many players crowding the space, which one will be the best — and who decides that? Arena, formerly LM Arena, has emerged as the de facto public leaderboard for frontier LLMs, influencing

item.title: Quantum pioneers win Turing Award for encryption breakthrough
item.description: [BBC Technology] It is hoped Charles H Bennett and Gilles Brassard's work will make digital communications secure for decades ahead.

item.title: Government backtracks on AI and copyright after outcry from major artists
item.description: [BBC Technology] However, the government's position is now unclear, saying it "no longer has a preferred option" for what to do next.

item.title: Tencent QClaw: Tencent's Fight for Traffic and Revenues
item.description: [钛媒体] Personal AI agents still need a human boss to step in as the safety net when it comes to complex, multi-step task chains.

item.title: 3 ways to reduce bias in AI with better context
item.description: [MarTech] AI bias often starts before the model runs. Missing context, flawed prompts and assumptions distort outputs. Here's how to correct them. The post 3 ways to reduce bias in AI with better context appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: 中国AI出海的“商业化时刻” ｜ 出海参考
item.description: [钛媒体] 中国AI出海进入下半场——从“技术Demo”到“商业产品”，从“技术炫技”到“商业落地”。

item.title: Alibaba Aims to Become a “Token Factory” in the AI Agent Era
item.description: [钛媒体] The creation of Alibaba Token Hub (ATH) and launch of Wukong were two heavy-hitting moves Alibaba rolled out in quick succession within 48 hours. "Over the past 11 years, DingTalk has changed how we work. Today, Wukong is trying to define a brand-new way of working for the AI era," said DingTalk's C

item.title: DLSS 5: Has Nvidia’s AI graphics technology gone too far?
item.description: [The Verge AI] Nvidia has revealed a new “3D guided neural rendering model” called DLSS 5 that can change a game’s lighting and materials in real-time, and… many gamers aren’t happy. From DLSS 5 memes to complaints about how it’s “yassified” Resident Evil Requiem characters in demos, the first impression has not b

item.title: 对话无招：Token经济学背后的两大结构性机会
item.description: [钛媒体] AI将带来海量数字劳动力，深刻改变科技公司未来的商业模式。

item.title: 鸿合科技易主首份年报：净利三连降，多措并举成效待考丨看财报
item.description: [钛媒体] 业绩三连降、净利润大减七成，换了大股东还回购股票，能好起来吗？

item.title: 氪星晚报｜新疆新能源外送电量突破3000亿千瓦时；三星电子或发生大规模罢工，恐波及全球半导体产供链；社交平台X调整印尼用户年龄限制以符合新规
item.description: [36氪] 大公司： 三星电子或发生大规模罢工，恐波及全球半导体产供链 据韩联社18日报道，由超过6.6万名韩国三星电子工会成员参与表决的投票结果显示，93.1%的工会成员赞成罢工。若无重大变化，三星电子工会成员将于5月21日至6月7日全面罢工。据韩联社报道，三星电子作为全球重要的存储芯片制造商，一旦发生罢工，可能进一步加剧由全球人工智能数据中心建设持续升温带来的全球半导体供应趋紧局面，其影响或波及汽车、计算机及智能手机等多个行业。 腾讯：四季度营收1943.7亿元，同比增长13% 36氪获悉，腾讯发布2025年第四季度及全年财报。财报显示，腾讯四季度营收1943.7亿元，同比增长13%；

item.title: 小牛电动胡依林：两轮电动车会越来越智能，但不可能像汽车一样自主决策
item.description: [钛媒体] AI改变了各行各业，现在轮到两轮电动车。

item.title: New R&D facility to build next-generation equipment targeting Singapore-based chip giants
item.description: [Straits Times] The facility looks to produce equipment for firms like Micron and GlobalFoundries.

item.title: Tokyo area condo prices top $803,000 for first time in 6 months
item.description: [Straits Times] Surging construction costs and demand drive sharp gains across Tokyo and nearby housing markets.

item.title: US social media giant Reddit fails to block Singapore firm’s ‘Reddio’ trademark registration
item.description: [Straits Times] The adjudicator concluded that the marks were dissimilar overall and unlikely to confuse consumers.

item.title: 2000万只“龙虾”进入企业，阿里的企业Agent新故事 | 最前线
item.description: [36氪] 对钉钉创始人无招而言，在 AI 时代顿悟的瞬间并不是 ChatGPT 横空出世，而是早在 2020 年。第一次离开钉钉时，他游历了大半个中国，调研了许许多多不同的城市，之后所想通的事。 “我想明白，AI 时代最颠覆性的变化不是其他，而是使用主体变了。”他看到，在二三线甚至更远的城市，因为互联网使用主体的变化，导致出现了各种各样不一样的应用供给——类似拼多多等应用崛起，就是这个逻辑。 而在大模型来了之后，这个判断更加清晰：在 AI 时代，互联网执行主体从人变成了 AI。 这个判断也贯穿了钉钉在 3 月 17 日举办的新品发布会。 几乎同一时间，阿里在 3 月 16 日宣布几乎是大

item.title: Maersk launches fully automated Singapore hub for e-commerce surge
item.description: [Straits Times] It will also handle bulk deliveries for retail items, wellness products, electronics and more.

item.title: 当黄仁勋和吴泳铭喊出同一个英文单词
item.description:
[36氪] 文｜邱晓芬 编辑｜苏建勋 美国旧金山当地时间3月16日，英伟达GTC 2026大会正式开幕。在英伟达创始人兼CEO黄仁勋两个小时慷慨激昂的主题演讲中，贯穿的一个关键词是——Token。
△ 黄仁勋，图源：发布会截图  无独有偶，在GTC 2026的前一天，阿里巴巴宣布成立Token事业群——这是地位与淘天电商、阿里云一般的核心独立事业群。这个新事业群里，阿里也明确了“创造Token、输送Token、应用Token”链路。 Token，是大模型处理文本信息时的基本语义单位。当你输入一段文本时，模型会先通过分词器，将文本切割成一系列Token。这些Token随即

item.title: 36氪首发｜专注智能运动眼镜，「光粒科技」完成近亿元Pre-B轮融资
item.description: [36氪] 36氪获悉，智能运动眼镜品牌「光粒科技」已完成近亿元Pre-B轮融资，本轮由杭州高新金投投资。本轮资金将主要用于团队建设、技术研发以及全球市场的营销销售拓展。  「光粒科技」成立于2017年，专注于AR智能眼镜及运动科学算法的研发。自2023年起，公司聚焦智能运动眼镜赛道，通过全息树脂光波导技术将运动数据实时呈现在用户眼前，解决运动场景下“数据不可见”的痛点。 目前，光粒已从早期单一的智能泳镜产品，逐步拓展为覆盖游泳、跑步、骑行、户外等多场景的智能运动眼镜矩阵。在智能泳镜这一细分赛道，光粒在国内市场占据领先地位，并开始在全球范围内与国际品牌展开竞争。 一边把智能泳镜做深，

item.title: Justice Department Says Anthropic Can’t Be Trusted With Warfighting Systems
item.description: [WIRED AI] In response to Anthropic’s lawsuit, the government said it lawfully penalized the company for trying to limit how its Claude AI models could be used by the military.

item.title: 8点1氪丨宝宝巴士推送低俗广告被罚30万；山姆客服回应给三文鱼加不可生食标签；360回应“安全龙虾”私钥泄露
item.description: [36氪] 今日热点导览 美股三大指数集体收涨，36氪涨超37% 韩国首尔市内地铁全线接入微信支付 雷军再回应停售第一代SU7：不想背刺老用户  三星将停售首款三折叠手机Galaxy Z TriFold 黄天鹅创始人回应角黄素争议：每天吃75个黄天鹅蛋才会超标 胖东来169元1克拉方糖戒指再上架，每人限购5枚 TOP3大新闻 儿歌APP跳转成人广告，宝宝巴士被罚30万 据界面新闻：公开资料显示，近日，宝宝巴士（福建）网络科技有限公司因发布低俗广告，被福州市仓山区市场监督管理局罚款30万，没收违法所得3.68元。此前，2025年10月，有网友反映称，宝宝巴士AP

item.title: Ad for AI editing app which said it could 'remove anything' banned
item.description: [BBC Technology] The UK regulator said the ad condoned "digitally altering and exposing women's bodies without their consent."

item.title: Nvidia’s DLSS 5 is like motion smoothing for video games, but worse
item.description: [The Verge AI] Yesterday Nvidia revealed its latest upscaling tech, called DLSS 5, which it described as "the company's most significant breakthrough in computer graphics since the debut of real-time ray tracing in 2018." Sounds good, until you actually see it. According to Nvidia, the tech "infuses pixels with ph

item.title: Now everyone in the US is getting Google’s personalized Gemini AI
item.description: [The Verge AI] Google announced on Tuesday that all users in the US will now have access to its Personal Intelligence feature, which lets you connect various Google apps to provide context for Gemini's responses and suggestions. Access was previously limited to Google AI Pro and AI Ultra subscribers. Now, free-tie

item.title: Microsoft appoints a new Copilot boss after AI leadership shake-up
item.description: [The Verge AI] Microsoft is doing another executive shuffle today to reorganize how it engineers its Copilot assistant. Different teams have been working on the consumer and commercial sides of Copilot for years, but Microsoft is about to unify parts of them in an effort to create a more cohesive Copilot for busin

item.title: Nvidia faces gamer backlash over 'breakthrough' AI graphics feature
item.description: [BBC Technology] Nvidia says the tool will transform game graphics - critics warn it could squeeze out artistic expression.

item.title: Middle managers are the missing link in AI adoption
item.description: [MarTech] Executives set the vision and teams test tools, but transformation happens in the middle. Equip managers to drive AI-powered workflow change. The post Middle managers are the missing link in AI adoption appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: How Invisalign Became the World’s Biggest User of 3D Printers
item.description: [WIRED AI] Joe Hogan, Align Technology’s plastics-nerd CEO, says you shouldn’t eat with your aligners and that you don’t need to wear your retainers every night.

item.title: Sears Exposed AI Chatbot Phone Calls and Text Chats to Anyone on the Web
item.description: [WIRED AI] Customer conversations with chatbots can include contact information and personal details that make it easier for scammers to launch phishing attacks and commit fraud.

item.title: AI firm Anthropic seeks weapons expert to stop users from 'misuse'
item.description: [BBC Technology] The artificial intelligence firm says it wants to prevent "catastrophic misuse" of its systems.

item.title: The latest AI-powered martech news and releases
item.description: [MarTech] Zendesk is betting AI agents will handle most customer service interactions, and its $200M-plus Forethought acquisition shows how serious it is. The post The latest AI-powered martech news and releases appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: China AI startup Moonshot snags funds at US$18 billion valuation
item.description: [Business Times] [BEIJING] Moonshot AI is seeking to raise as much as US$1 billion in an expanded funding round that would value the startup...

item.title: US Commerce Department withdraws planned rule on AI chip exports
item.description: [Business Times] [NEW YORK] The US Commerce Department withdrew a planned rule on artificial intelligence (AI) chip exports on Friday (Mar 13), the latest...

item.title: The price isn’t right: Oil spike fuels risks in South-east Asia’s tech scene
item.description: [Business Times] RISING oil prices triggered by the ongoing war in the Middle East could quickly drive up operating costs within South-east Asia’s tech...

item.title: Teens sue Musk's xAI over Grok's pornographic images of them
item.description: [BBC Technology] Musk's AI chatbot has created millions of fake sexualised images, experts say.

item.title: Salesforce Agentforce: What you need to know
item.description: [MarTech] We've updated our page on Agentforce with details of the Agentforce Contact Center release. The post Salesforce Agentforce: What you need to know appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: The new must-haves in B2B ecommerce tech stacks go beyond CRM and CMS
item.description: [MarTech] As B2B buyers expect more B2C-like experiences, ecommerce marketers need tools that go far beyond the basics. The post The new must-haves in B2B ecommerce tech stacks go beyond CRM and CMS appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Models Are Applying to Be the Face of AI Scams
item.description: [WIRED AI] Dozens of Telegram channels reviewed by WIRED include job listings for “AI face models.” The (mostly) women who land these gigs are likely being used to dupe victims out of their money.

item.title: Most consumers use AI, but few fully trust it
item.description: [MarTech] New research shows AI is already shaping product discovery and purchases, but a large gap between usage and trust is creating new challenges for marketers. The post Most consumers use AI, but few fully trust it appeared first on MarTech.

item.title: Google's AI Search Results Love to Refer You Back to Google
item.description: [WIRED AI] The company's generative AI search tools increasingly cite its own services, like Google Search and YouTube, over third-party publishers.
